economic_notes: Nanoose Economic Development Master Limited Partnership (99.9% interest), Nanoose Economic Development Corporation (100%), Snaw-naw-as Holdings Ltd. (100%), Snaw-naw-as Forest Services Ltd. (100%), Snaw-naw-as Aquaculture Ventures Inc. (100%), Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20%), BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Multiple limited partnerships including Market, Investments, Forest Services, Aquaculture Ventures, and Campsite.
notes: Consolidated statements include 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 2 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Significant increase in tangible capital assets from $12.3M to $17.8M due to $6.3M in capital acquisitions. Large decrease in cash from $3.3M to $0.7M. Deferred revenue decreased significantly from $4.76M to $2.57M. Province of BC revenue increased dramatically from $1.03M to $4.09M year over year. Total government transfers calculated as all funding from government sources: BC ($4,093,224) + ISC ($3,112,232) + CMHC ($1,593,759) + DFO ($1,208,346) + FNHA ($1,074,824) + FNESC ($321,032) + CSETS ($235,509) + Kwumut Lelum ($84,127) + BC Aboriginal Child Care ($73,048) + VIU ($63,045) + Daycare ($58,459) + GOC ($46,713) + First Peoples Cultural Council ($124,549) + Land Code ($127,435) = ~$12,216,282 approximate.
